emails.subject: Group Split
emails.body: Group Split Sally, If it is ok with you, Frank and I would like to split the group in the following manner. Frank would primarily take care of the following groups: Bob Hall Jeff Gosset Stacey White Sheri Thomas I would primarily take care of the following groups: Leslie Reeves Shona Wilson Beth Apollo James Scribner Mary Solmonson Please let us know if this is ok with you and we will announce it accordingly. Thanks, hgm

emails.subject: Re: Group Split
emails.body: Re: Group Split You and Frank can best decide how to organize this. I am comfortable with your decisions, so feel free to go ahead with this. --Sally Enron North America Corp. From: Hector McLoughlin ENRON 02/15/2001 04:47 PM
